data.title: 国际服主线Vol.2 第二章前篇更新
data.summary: [Main Story Preview] Clockwork Flower Pavane Chapter 2 is on its way! The Millennium Prize's Special
data.body:
[Main Story Preview]

Clockwork Flower Pavane Chapter 2 is on its way!
The Millennium Prize's Special Honors were awarded to the Game Development Department, and all's well that ends well. 
But...was that really the end?

#BlueArchive
